testcase.name: test_version

failure.message: TypeError: call() got an unexpected keyword argument 'pixelbuffer'

testcase.failure:
def test_version(): > result = tmx(["--version"]) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
test/test_cli.py:10: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
pixelbuffer = ['--version'], tile_size = 256, metatiling = 1, grid = 'geodetic' output_format = 'Tile'
def tmx(pixelbuffer=0, tile_size=256, metatiling=1, grid="geodetic", output_format="Tile"): """Tile management commands.""" > plac.call(bounds, pixelbuffer=pixelbuffer, tile_size=tile_size, metatiling=metatiling, grid=grid, output_format=output_format) E TypeError: call() got an unexpected keyword argument 'pixelbuffer'
tilematrix/tmx/main.py:11: TypeError

testcase.name: test_bounds

failure.message: TypeError: call() got an unexpected keyword argument 'pixelbuffer'

testcase.failure:
def test_bounds(): zoom, row, col = 12, 0, 0 for grid in ["geodetic", "mercator"]: > _run_bbox_bounds(zoom, row, col, "bounds", grid=grid)

pixelbuffer = ['--pixelbuffer', '0', '--metatiling', '1', '--grid', 'geodetic', ...] tile_size = 256, metatiling = 1, grid = 'geodetic', output_format = 'Tile'
def tmx(pixelbuffer=0, tile_size=256, metatiling=1, grid="geodetic", output_format="Tile"): """Tile management commands.""" > plac.call(bounds, pixelbuffer=pixelbuffer, tile_size=tile_size, metatiling=metatiling, grid=grid, output_format=output_format) E TypeError: call() got an unexpected keyword argument 'pixelbuffer'
tilematrix/tmx/main.py:11: TypeError

testcase.name: test_tile

failure.message: TypeError: call() got an unexpected keyword argument 'pixelbuffer'

testcase.failure:
def test_tile(): point = [10, 20] zoom = 5 for grid in ["geodetic", "mercator"]: > _run_tile(zoom, point, grid=grid)

testcase.name: test_tiles

failure.message: TypeError: call() got an unexpected keyword argument 'pixelbuffer'

testcase.failure:
def test_tiles(): bounds = (10, 20, 30, 40) zoom = 6 for grid in ["geodetic", "mercator"]: > _run_tiles(zoom, bounds, grid=grid)
